name: Ogmore-by-Sea to Dunraven
highlights: Jurassic layer-cake cliffs along Wales' Heritage Coast.
points_of_interest: Dunraven Castle garden; Bronze Age tumuli
viewpoints: Southerndown cliffs (Doctor Who beach); Exmoor across the Bristol Channel
food_drink_nearby: The Plough & Harrow Monknash; Pelican in her Piety Ogmore
hazards_notes: Cliff edges undercut; keep back from edge
